summary: Full backend + frontend test of LifeOS MVP. Backend pytest suite (12 tests) covers auth, tasks, events, projects+kanban, transactions, budget summary, AI streaming, dashboard - all PASS. Frontend Playwright e2e: demo login, tasks CRUD+toggle, calendar 3 views + event creation, project + kanban card, budget income+expense, AI advisor streaming response in French, theme toggle, logout - all working. App is production-ready for the listed features.

issues: Radix DialogContent emits a11y warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined} for {DialogContent}'. Add a DialogDescription (or aria-describedby) to every modal for accessibility.

action_items: Optional: rename nav data-testid values to English keys (nav-tasks, nav-calendar, nav-projects, nav-dashboard) instead of deriving from French labels (currently nav-tâches with accent, nav-calendrier, nav-projets, nav-tableau-de-bord). The current scheme is non-ASCII and inconsistent with the testid contract advertised in the spec. Tests had to use direct route navigation (/tasks, /calendar, /projects) to bypass this.
Optional a11y: add DialogDescription to all Radix Dialog modals to remove console warnings.
Note for spec: login redirects to '/' (the dashboard route), not '/dashboard'.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses set_cookie samesite='none' + secure=True. Good for cross-origin cookie auth via ingress; verify behavior in environments without HTTPS.
AI streaming endpoint stores assistant message in finally block – good resilience.
Demo seed updates password if changed on startup – idempotent ✓.
build_budget_context fetches up to 5000 transactions every AI call; fine for personal use but may slow under heavy load.
Login.jsx redirects to root (/) on success; review_request mentioned '/dashboard' – cosmetic mismatch only.
test_credentials: demo@lifeos.app / demo1234 (verified working). New users registered via /api/auth/register also tested.
seed_data_creation: Tests create their own data with TEST_ prefix and clean up where possible. Test artefacts in DB: a few TEST_UI_* docs on demo account after frontend run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py runs all in ~8s. Note: pydantic EmailStr rejects .test TLD – use @example.com for synthetic emails. Frontend nav data-testids are derived from French labels (nav-calendrier, nav-tâches, nav-projets, nav-budget, nav-tableau-de-bord). For Playwright avoid the accented one by navigating directly via page.goto('/tasks') etc. Login redirects to '/' not '/dashboard'.
rca of the issue: No bugs to RCA – all listed features verified working end-to-end. Two minor mismatches with the spec are documented above (nav testids in French, login redirect to '/').
